title: WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY HOUSING AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT DIVISION WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides weatherization and energy education. Weatherization can include insulation, air sealing, and other measures designed to keep heat in the home during the winter and cool during the summer. The program is offered for single-family homes, mobile and manufactured homes, and in certain circumstances, multi-family unitis. Weatherization measures vary by home. 2051 Kaen Road Suite 245 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: -Household income must be at or below 200% of the Federal Poverty Level with priority given to older adults, people with disabilities, and families with children under the age of 18 -For applicants in multi-family dwelling (duplex, apartment, etc.), all people living in the building must apply Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (503) 650-3338 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 650-3338 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. The program operates on a waitlist; average waitlist time is 2-4 years. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the intersection of Kaen Road and Beavercreek Road. TriMet bus line 33 (Clackamas Community College stop). Services: Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME ACCESSIBILITY GRANTS HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME REPAIR LOANS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY HOUSING AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT DIVISION
